description: Routing-resolution fixtures for the /review skill (v9.0.0-alpha.1+). Single-dimension invocations resolve to a reference file; sweep invocations dispatch sub-agents (verified separately by the verifier's composition-validity check, not by reference-path resolution).

fixtures.purpose: When a name exists as both dimension and aggregate, bare invocation hits the dimension.
No-arg invocation should render the menu, not pick a default.
